REPLY REGARDING ANTISLAPP MTN AND DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEE, JAMIE

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT JAMIE LEE'S DEMURRER. RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. THE DEFAULT IS CONCLUSIVE ONLY ON ISSUES SPECIFICALLY RAISED. THE COMPLAINT IN THIS CASE ALLEGES OTHER WRONGFUL ACTS. THE SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF ON THE FOURTH AND SEVENTH CAUSES OF ACTION WHICH ARE CENTERED ON HABITABILITY ISSUES. THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION REFERS TO ACTS TO RECOVER POSSESSION AND NECESSARILY INCLUDES PETITIONING ACTIVITY. THE DECLARATIONS OF PLAINTIFFS MAKE OUT A PRIMA FACIE CASE AND THE VAST MAJORITY OF THE CONDUCT ON WHICH CAUSE OF ACTION IS BASED IS NOT PROTECTED BY THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE. COURT RULES ON THE EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS AS FOLLOWS: OBJECTION 1 SUSTAINED AS TO PARAGRAPH EIGHT. OBJECTION 2 IS OVERRULED. OBJECTIONS TO PARAGRAPHS TEN AND FIFTEEN ARE OVERRULED. AS TO THE CONTRERAS DECLARATION, OBJECTION 1 IS SUSTAINED. OBJECTIONS TWO FOUR AND FIVE ARE OVERRULED. OBJECTION THREE, PARAGRAPH EIGHT IS OVERRULED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories and request for production of documents (Francisco Contreras Sr.) and form interrogatories (Natacha Contreras) is moot as responses have been served. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $250 shall be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
